factors.summary: Demand is accelerating, particularly in the Pool segment and commercial flow business.

evidence.text: • increased sales volume within our Pool segment due to higher demand compared to the prior year; • increased sales volume in our commercial flow business within our Flow segment in the first half of 2024 compared to the prior year; and • increased selling prices in our commercial flow and industrial solutions businesses within our Flow segment, in our commercial business within our Water Solutions segment and in our Pool segment to mitigate inflationary cost increases.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Demand is accelerating in key segments, indicating positive momentum.

factors.summary: The company is successfully raising prices to mitigate inflationary cost increases.

evidence.text: • increased selling prices in our commercial flow and industrial solutions businesses within our Flow segment, in our commercial business within our Water Solutions segment and in our Pool segment to mitigate inflationary cost increases.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Successfully raising prices to mitigate inflation, showing positive action.

factors.summary: Organic revenue growth is mixed, with some segments experiencing declines while others show improvement.

evidence.text: • decreased sales volume in our residential flow and industrial solutions businesses within our Flow segment compared to the prior year; • decreased sales volume within our commercial and residential businesses in our Water Solutions segment compared to the prior year, in addition to the completion of a large project in 2023 within our commercial business that did not recur in the first half of 2024; and • unfavorable foreign currency effects compared to the prior year.

sentiment.label: neutral
sentiment.rationale: Mixed performance across segments with some declines and improvements.

factors.summary: Unit volumes are mixed, with some businesses experiencing declines while others show growth.

evidence.text: • decreased sales volume in our residential flow and industrial solutions businesses within our Flow segment compared to the prior year; • increased sales volume in our commercial flow business in the first half of 2024 compared to the prior year; and • increased sales volume within our Pool segment due to higher demand compared to the prior year.

sentiment.label: neutral
sentiment.rationale: Mixed unit volume trends with some growth and declines.

factors.summary: The Pool segment is experiencing the fastest growth, while the Flow and Water Solutions segments are facing challenges.

evidence.text: • increased sales volume within our Pool segment due to higher demand compared to the prior year; and • decreased sales volume in our commercial and residential businesses in our Water Solutions segment compared to the prior year.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Strong growth in Pool segment despite challenges elsewhere.

factors.summary: Input costs are rising due to inflationary pressures, particularly for raw materials and logistics.

evidence.text: • inflationary cost increases for certain raw materials as well as logistics and transportation costs. The current volatile market for commodities has the potential to continue to drive price increases in our supply chain.
evidence.subsection: Key Trends and Uncertainties Regarding Our Existing Business

sentiment.label: very_negative
sentiment.rationale: Rising costs due to inflation pose significant challenges.

factors.summary: Gross and operating margins are improving due to pricing actions and productivity gains.

evidence.text: • The 2.9 and 2.1 percentage point increases in gross profit as a percentage of net sales in the second quarter and first half, respectively, of 2024 from 2023 were primarily driven by: • increases in selling prices to mitigate impacts of inflationary costs; • increased productivity mainly driven by manufacturing leverage within our Pool segment and transformation initiatives.

sentiment.label: very_positive
sentiment.rationale: Improving margins driven by pricing and productivity gains.

factors.summary: Cost reduction initiatives are delivering measurable savings, particularly through the Transformation Program.

evidence.text: • During 2023 and the first six months of 2024, we made strategic progress on our Transformation Program initiatives with a focus on our four key themes of pricing excellence, strategic sourcing, operations excellence and organizational effectiveness. We expect to continue to execute on our key Transformation Program initiatives to drive margin expansion and to continue to incur transformation costs throughout the remainder of 2024 and beyond.
evidence.subsection: Key Trends and Uncertainties Regarding Our Existing Business

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Measurable savings from cost reduction initiatives.

factors.summary: Productivity is improving due to transformation initiatives and manufacturing leverage.

evidence.text: • increased productivity mainly driven by manufacturing leverage within our Pool segment and transformation initiatives.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: The summary indicates clear improvement in productivity due to transformation initiatives and manufacturing leverage.

factors.summary: Regulatory changes, such as the OECD Pillar Two Model Rules, are negatively impacting the effective tax rate.

evidence.text: • The Organization for Economic Co-operation and Development Pillar Two Model Rules ('Pillar Two') for a global 15.0% minimum tax are in the process of being adopted by a number of jurisdictions in which we operate. Pillar Two has negatively impacted our effective tax rate in 2024. That impact could change in the future as we continue to evaluate the enacted legislative changes and as new guidance becomes available.
evidence.subsection: Key Trends and Uncertainties Regarding Our Existing Business

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Regulatory changes like the OECD Pillar Two Model Rules have negatively impacted the effective tax rate, indicating a moderate headwind.

factors.summary: Management appears confident with actions such as maintaining investment grade rating, reducing debt, and returning cash to shareholders.

evidence.text: • Committing to maintain our investment grade rating; • Focusing on reducing our long-term debt; • Returning cash to shareholders through dividends and share repurchases; and • Accelerating our performance with strategically aligned mergers and acquisitions.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Management's actions, such as maintaining an investment grade rating and returning cash to shareholders, reflect confidence in the company's outlook.

factors.summary: Near-term risks include supply chain pressures, inflationary cost increases, and unfavorable foreign currency effects.

evidence.text: • While we have taken pricing actions and implemented transformation initiatives that we expect to improve productivity and offset cost increases, we anticipate supply chain pressures and inflationary cost increases to continue for the remainder of 2024. • Unfavorable foreign currency effects compared to the prior year.
evidence.subsection: Key Trends and Uncertainties Regarding Our Existing Business

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Near-term risks include supply chain pressures, inflationary cost increases, and unfavorable foreign currency effects, indicating moderate headwinds.

factors.summary: The company's long-term strategic direction is clear, focusing on growth through digital innovation, technology, and ESG initiatives.

evidence.text: • Focusing growth initiatives that accelerate our investments in digital, innovation, technology and ESG.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: The company's focus on growth through digital innovation, technology, and ESG initiatives suggests a clear long-term strategic direction.

factors.summary: Key sensitivities include commodity prices, interest rates, and foreign exchange movements.

evidence.text: • The current volatile market for commodities has the potential to continue to drive price increases in our supply chain. • N.M. Not Meaningful

sentiment.label: neutral
sentiment.rationale: Key sensitivities include volatile commodity prices and foreign exchange movements, which are risks but do not clearly indicate a positive or negative trend.

factors.summary: R&D spending is stable, with efforts focused on driving innovation.

evidence.text: • Research and development expenses 48.9 50.8 (1.9) (3.7) %

sentiment.label: neutral
sentiment.rationale: R&D spending is stable, with no clear indication of improvement or decline, leading to a neutral assessment.

factors.summary: CapEx is focused on growth initiatives and innovation.

evidence.text: • Focusing growth initiatives that accelerate our investments in digital, innovation, technology and ESG.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Capital expenditures are focused on growth initiatives and innovation, indicating a positive outlook.

factors.summary: The company is deleveraging through actions such as reducing long-term debt.

evidence.text: • Focusing on reducing our long-term debt.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: The company is actively reducing long-term debt, indicating a positive step towards financial health.

factors.summary: Shareholder returns are being prioritized through dividends and share repurchases.

evidence.text: • Returning cash to shareholders through dividends and share repurchases.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Prioritizing returns through dividends and repurchases shows a positive approach to shareholder value.

factors.summary: Overall economic conditions are a headwind due to factors like inflation and supply chain pressures.

evidence.text: • The current volatile market for commodities has the potential to continue to drive price increases in our supply chain. • The overall global economic and business conditions impacting our business, including the strength of housing and related markets and conditions relating to international hostilities.

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Inflation and supply chain issues are creating headwinds, impacting performance negatively.

factors.summary: Lower variable debt has positively impacted net interest expense.

evidence.text: • lower variable debt compared to the same period of the prior year.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Lower variable debt has positively impacted net interest expense, indicating a favorable development.

factors.summary: Foreign exchange movements are negatively impacting net sales.

evidence.text: • unfavorable foreign currency effects compared to the prior year.

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Unfavorable foreign currency effects are negatively impacting net sales, indicating a challenge.
